title: Add a dark mode toggle to the settings page
description: Users who work at night want a dark theme. Add a toggle on the settings page that switches the interface between the light and dark palettes and remembers the choice.
motivation: Without a dark theme, night-time users face a bright interface that strains the eyes. A toggle gives them control without affecting anyone on the default light theme.
body:
**Category**: feature | **Scope**: Medium

## Description

Users who work at night want a dark theme.

## Motivation

Reduces eye strain at night.
